title: Sword of the Grove applies Atk +5 while equipped

plan.title: Sword of the Grove applies Atk +5 while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Sword of the Grove to a modifier-zero primary creature, run a battle, and verify attack damage modifier receives +5.

notes: Place test_primary_creature_mod_0 on player_1 field as primary so the attack modifier comes only from Sword of the Grove.

steps: Player 1 plays Sword of the Grove and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the resolved attack damage modifier.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +5 Atk bonus
Sword of the Grove remains equipped/on field

manualVerification: Confirm the Atk bonus applies only while Sword of the Grove remains equipped.
riskNotes: Atk bonuses are verified through battle damage roll modifier output.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate basic Atk equip modifier through a resolved battle roll.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
